virtual.courseNameLimit.message: Kurs nomi 50 ta harfdan oshmasligi kerak

virtual.noPermissionTip.message: Sizning hisobingiz virtual simulyatsiya tajribalariga kirishga ruxsatga ega emas. Iltimos, avtorizatsiya uchun onlayn qo'llab-quvvatlash bilan bog'laning yoki 400 610 7808 raqamiga qo'ng'iroq qiling.

virtual.publishConfirmTip.message: Nashr etilgandan so'ng, o'qituvchilar sinflarda tajriba resurslaridan foydalanishi mumkin. Nashr etishni tasdiqlaysizmi?

virtual.deleteFailTip.message: {name} dagi tajriba resurslari sinflar tomonidan ishlatilmoqda va o'chirilmaydi.

virtual.withdrawConfirmTip.message: Nashr bekor qilinganidan so'ng, yangi sinflar bu resurslardan foydalanishi mumkin emas. Mavjud sinflar ta'sir qilmaydi. Nashrni bekor qilishni tasdiqlaysizmi?

virtual.enterNameOrStudentId.message: Ism yoki talaba ID bo'yicha qidirish

virtual.scorePatternRule.message: Iltimos, 0–100 oralig'ida ball kiriting (maksimal 1 ta kasr raqam)

virtual.teacherRoleTip.message: Siz o'qituvchi sifatida kirganingiz. Tajribani boshlash uchun talaba rejimiga o'ting!

virtual.chooseExperimentTimeTip.message: Har bir urinish uchun ball tafsilotlarini ko'rish uchun boshlanish vaqtini tanlang.

virtual.courseSummaryLimit.message: Umumiy ko'rinish 10000 ta harfdan oshmasligi kerak

virtual.affiliatedSchoolLimit.message: Maktab nomi 100 ta harfdan oshmasligi kerak

virtual.photoTypeLimit.message: Rasm JPEG, JPG yoki PNG formatda bo'lishi kerak

virtual.tonglabTip.message: Tajriba kontenti Tonglabdan. Ma'lumotlarni avtomatik yuklash uchun bosing.

virtual.experimentPublishTip.message: Eslatma: Nashr etishdan oldin, tajriba platformaning API spetsifikatsiyasiga muvofiq integratsiyalanganligiga ishonch hosil qiling; aks holda ballar yig'ilmaydi.

virtual.experimentNameLimit.message: Tajriba nomi 50 ta harfdan oshmasligi kerak

textbook.shareTip.message: Ulashish uchun QR kodni skanerlang yoki havolani nusxalang

textbook.totalLearnerCountTip.message: Bu raqam barcha SPOC sesiyalaridagi talabalarni (maktab ichidagi va tashqari) va o'z-o'zidan ro'yxatdan o'tgan talabalarni o'z ichiga oladi. Ma'lumotlar har kuni yangilanadi.

textbook.totalSchoolCountTip.message: Ushbu kursni qabul qilgan maktablarning umumiy soni. Ma'lumotlar har kuni yangilanadi.

textbook.courseViewCountTip.message: Kurs bosh sahifasining ko'rilishi va umumiy kurs o'qish sessiyalarining yig'indisi. Ma'lumotlar har kuni yangilanadi.

textbook.noTermTip.message: Ushbu kurs muayyan semestr bilan bog'liq emas. Siz uni qo'shilib, mustaqil o'qishingiz mumkin.

textbook.noSelfJoinTip.message: Ushbu kurs uchun o'z-o'zidan ro'yxatdan o'tish mavjud emas.

textbook.teacherRoleJoinTip.message: Siz hozirda o'qituvchi hisobi bilan kirganingiz. Kursga qo'shilish uchun talaba rejimiga o'ting.

textbook.sameSchoolJoinTip.message: Ushbu kurs sizning tashkilotingizdagi o'qituvchi tomonidan taqdim etiladi. Baholarni yozishda muammolarni oldini olish uchun, o'qituvchingiz taqdim etgan sinf kodi yoki QR kodi yordamida qo'shiling.

textbook.notStudentRoleJoinTip.message: Siz hozirda talaba hisobi bilan kirganingiz emas. Kursga qo'shilish uchun tizimdan chiqing va talaba hisobi bilan kirishingiz kerak.

textbook.teacherRoleBuyTip.message: Siz hozirda o'qituvchi hisobi bilan kirganingiz. Sotib olish uchun talaba rejimiga o'ting.

textbook.notStudentRoleBuyTip.message: Siz hozirda talaba hisobi bilan kirganingiz emas. Sotib olish uchun tizimdan chiqing va talaba hisobi bilan kirishingiz kerak.

textbook.declarationTips.message: For courses hosted on the U-Campus platform, if you intend to apply for projects such as First-Class Undergraduate Courses​ or Vocational Education Online Quality Courses, the course instructor can manage application details, semesters, and view operational data here.

textbook.originCourseTip.message: Tanlangan kurs darsligi portal kurs baholash portali sifatida xizmat qiladi.

textbook.courseNameLimit.message: Kurs nomi 200 ta harfdan oshmasligi kerak.

textbook.deleteDeclaredCourseConfirm.message: Deleting the application course will not​ delete the associated source courseware or classes, but it will​ delete all configured semester information. Are you sure you want to delete?

textbook.versionTip.message: Agar kurs darsligi uchun katta yangilanish talab qilinadigan bo'lsa, iltimos, uni avval Kurs Darsligi Kutubxonasida yangi versiya sifatida nusxalang. Yangi versiyani yaratgandan so'ng, uni ushbu kursga qo'lda bog'lishingiz kerak. Faqat shunda yangi versiyadan ro'yxatdan o'tgan talabalar ma'lumotlari ushbu kursga hisoblanadi.

textbook.termTip.message: Agar kurs bir nechta semestrlar bo'ylab taqdim etilgan bo'lsa, har bir semestr uchun yangi sinf bo'limi yaratishingiz kerak. Keyin, bu yerda semestrni qo'shing va mos keladigan sinf bo'limini bog'lang. Sozlashdan so'ng, bu yerda har bir sessiya uchun operatsion ma'lumotlarni ko'ra olasiz.

textbook.selfLearnerCountLabel.message: Mustaqil o'quvchilar soni (o'z-o'zidan ro'yxatdan o'tgan, ammo hech qanday semestrga tayinlanmagan talabalar):

textbook.associateClassTip.message: Bog'lash uchun mos keladigan sinf bo'limini tanlang. Har bir bo'lim faqat bitta semestrga bog'lanishi mumkin.

textbook.questionUnitTip.message: (Only assignments of the "Quiz"​ type contain questions)

textbook.dataUpdateDailyTip.message: * Ma'lumotlar har kuni erta tongda yangilanadi.

textbook.endTimeEarlyError.message: Tugash vaqti boshlanish vaqtidan oldin bo'lishi mumkin emas

textbook.joinSuccessTip.message: Muvaffaqiyatli ro'yxatdan o'tdingiz! Hozir kursga kirib o'qishni boshlaysizmi?

textbook.selectAtLeastOneVersion.message: Please select at least one version.

textbook.cancelAssociateConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to unlink?

course.teachingMaterialsTip.message: Teachers can customize the course content according to class teaching arrangement and situation of students. Click: "Add Module", "Add Unit", "Add Activity", you can set your own course structure and content for these 3 layers. Click button(s) following after the unit/activity, you can hide or unhide the unit/activity and add Remarks.

login.organizationLogin.message: Log in to your institutional account

login.smsLoginOnlySupportsMainlandChina.message: *SMS login is only supported for mobile numbers from Mainland China.

login.organizationLoginTip.message: Accounts that are registered and bound with a Student/Staff ID can log in to U-Campus using the Institution Name, Student/Staff ID, and password.

login.loginAgreementPrefix.message: By logging in, you agree to the Ulearning

login.enterStudentIdOrEmployeeId.message: Please enter student ID/ work ID

login.cheatDetectedTip.message: The system has detected misconduct, such as cheating, in the {courses} course(s) associated with this account. The account has been automatically frozen. Please contact your instructor or the platform administrator for assistance.

login.loginFailedTooManyTimes.message: You have tried 5 times and the account is locked. Please retry after 3 minutes.

login.dynamicCodeExpired.message: The dynamic security code has expired
